 class GNN(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, num_tasks=128, num_layers=5, emb_dim=300, dropout=0.5, use_vn=True):

@@ -76,10 +75,22 @@
             nn.init.constant_(self.vn_emb.weight, 0)

             self.vn_updates = nn.ModuleList([VirtualNodeUpdate(emb_dim) for _ in range(num_layers - 1)])

         

-        # Prediction head with JK (jumping knowledge) - concatenate all layer outputs

-        self.pool_proj = nn.Linear(emb_dim, emb_dim)

+        # Jumping knowledge

+        if jk == 'cat':

+            head_dim = emb_dim * num_layers

+        elif jk == 'sum':

+            head_dim = emb_dim

+        else:  # last

+            head_dim = emb_dim

+        

+        # Prediction head

@@ -94,24 +105,37 @@
         if self.use_vn:

             vn_emb = self.vn_emb.weight.expand(num_graphs, -1)

         

+        h_list = []

+        

         # Message passing layers

         for i in range(self.num_layers):

             # Add virtual node to all nodes

             if self.use_vn:

                 h = h + vn_emb[batch]

             

-            # GNN layer with residual

+            # GNN layer

             h_new = self.convs[i](h, edge_index, e)

-            h_new = self.bns[i](h_new)

             if i < self.num_layers - 1:

                 h_new = F.relu(h_new)

                 h_new = F.dropout(h_new, self.dropout, self.training)

-            h = h + h_new  # residual

+            

+            # Residual connection

+            h = h + h_new

+            

+            h_list.append(h)

             

             # Update virtual node

             if self.use_vn and i < self.num_layers - 1:

                 vn_emb = self.vn_updates[i](vn_emb, h, batch, num_graphs)

         

-        # Global mean pooling

-        h_graph = scatter_mean(h, batch, dim_size=num_graphs)

+        # Jumping knowledge

+        if self.jk == 'cat':

+            h_graphs = [scatter_mean(hl, batch, dim_size=num_graphs) for hl in h_list]

+            h_graph = torch.cat(h_graphs, dim=1)

+        elif self.jk == 'sum':

+            h_graphs = [scatter_mean(hl, batch, dim_size=num_graphs) for hl in h_list]

+            h_graph = sum(h_graphs)

+        else:  # last

+            h_graph = scatter_mean(h_list[-1], batch, dim_size=num_graphs)

+        

         return self.head(h_graph)

+    cosine = CosineAnnealingLR(opt, T_max=ep - warmup_ep, eta_min=1e-6)

+    sch = SequentialLR(opt, [warmup, cosine], milestones=[warmup_ep])

+    

+    scaler = GradScaler()

     

     os.makedirs('checkpoints', exist_ok=True)

     best = 0.0; step = 0

     

-    # Try to resume

+    # Try to resume from compatible checkpoint

     ckpt_path = 'checkpoints/last.pt'

-    print(f'Done. Best AP: {best:.4f}')

+    with open(lf, 'w') as mf:

+        for e in range(start_epoch, ep+1):

+            model.train(); tl_sum=0; nb=0; t0=time.time()

+            for batch in tl:

+                x, ei, ea, bt, ng, y = batch[0].to(dev), batch[1].to(dev), batch[2].to(dev), batch[3].to(dev), batch[4], batch[5].to(dev)

+                with autocast():

+                    p = model(x, ei, ea, bt, ng)

+                    m = (y==y)

+                    loss = F.binary_cross_entropy_with_logits(p[m], y[m])

+                opt.zero_grad(set_to_none=True)

+                scaler.scale(loss).backward()

+                scaler.unscale_(opt)

+                torch.nn.utils.clip_grad_norm_(model.parameters(), 5.0)

+                scaler.step(opt)

+                scaler.update()

+                tl_sum += loss.item(); nb += 1; step += 1

+            sch.step()

+            avg_loss = tl_sum / nb

+            

+            # Evaluate every 3 epochs or last 10 epochs

+            if e % 3 == 0 or e >= ep - 10 or e <= 3:

+                ap = evaluate(model, vl, dev)

+                dt = time.time() - t0

+                print(f'E{e}/{ep} loss={avg_loss:.4f} ap={ap:.4f} t={dt:.0f}s', flush=True)

+                mf.write(json.dumps({'step': step, 'epoch': e, 'loss': avg_loss, 'accuracy': ap}) + '\n')

+                mf.flush()

+                

+                args_dict = {'num_layers': nl, 'emb_dim': ed, 'dropout': do, 'use_vn': bool(use_vn), 'jk': jk}

+                save_dict = {

+                    'model_state_dict': model.state_dict(),

+                    'optimizer_state_dict': opt.state_dict(),

+                    'epoch': e, 'best_ap': max(best, ap), 'step': step,

+                    'args': args_dict

+                }

+                torch.save(save_dict, 'checkpoints/last.pt')

+                

+                if ap > best:

+                    best = ap

+                    torch.save(save_dict, 'checkpoints/best.pt')

+                    print(f'  New best: {best:.4f}', flush=True)

+            else:

+                dt = time.time() - t0

+                mf.write(json.dumps({'step': step, 'epoch': e, 'loss': avg_loss}) + '\n')

+                mf.flush()

+    

+    print(f'Done. Best AP: {best:.4f}', flush=True)

 

-if __name__=='__main__': main()

+if __name__ == '__main__':

+    main()
